title: GDC-PANCAN.htseq_counts and associated meta-data no longer available from gdc.xenahubs.net
author: Genomic Data Commons
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-3.0-us
description: The RNA-seq data and associated meta-data I used for my publications, downloaded from gdc.xenahubs.net but no longer available in this form (i.e. raw counts) from the website.
